{ inputs, pkgs, ... }:
let
  system = pkgs.stdenv.hostPlatform.system;
  spiritJudge = inputs.spirit-judge.packages.${system}.default;
in
pkgs.runCommand "spirit-judge-cli-contract" { } ''
  set -eu

  # This calls the real package locked by this flake. It proves only the
  # unauthenticated CLI boundary: no socket is opened and no provider is called.
  if "${spiritJudge}/bin/spirit-judge" > output 2>&1; then
    exit 1
  fi
  grep -q 'serve --socket <path>' output
  touch "$out"
''

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
if pgrep -af '(^|/)(nix|cargo)( |$)' >/tmp/deployment-lock-processes; then
  cat /tmp/deployment-lock-processes
  exit 1
fi
cd /home/li/primary/repos/CriomOS-spirit-judge-deploy
rm -f /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock
nix flake lock . --max-jobs 1 --cores 1 \
  --override-input criomos-home github:LiGoldragon/CriomOS-home/8cc609ebc2c5f145024510bd3fdbd7cd9f406f67 \
  --override-input spirit github:LiGoldragon/spirit/f9f5266abec8a0bcf43b8bcc93cf066aa9f97ea2 \
  --output-lock-file /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock
test -s /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock
nix eval --impure --raw --max-jobs 1 --cores 1 --expr '
let
  lock = builtins.fromJSON (builtins.readFile /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock);
  nodes = lock.nodes;
  require = condition: message: if condition then true else throw message;
in
  assert require (nodes.criomos-home.locked.rev == "8cc609ebc2c5f145024510bd3fdbd7cd9f406f67") "unexpected Home revision";
  assert require (nodes.spirit.locked.rev == "f9f5266abec8a0bcf43b8bcc93cf066aa9f97ea2") "unexpected Spirit revision";
  assert require (nodes.spirit-judge.locked.rev == "c2303a30ff88fea527a8075b22f1d598a80fdb80") "unexpected witness revision";
  "generated-pin-chain-ok\n"
'
install -m 0644 /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock flake.lock
rm -f /tmp/spirit-judge-deployment-generated.lock
